landing.title: Your voice, heard and acted on
landing.subtitle: Submit feedback, complaints, and suggestions. Our team reviews every submission, investigates, and follows up — with a full audit trail.

submit.title: Submit easily
submit.body: Share feedback in your language, with or without an account.

classify.title: Smart classification
classify.body: Cases are categorized and prioritized — assisted by AI.

resolve.title: Tracked to resolution
resolve.body: Every case is assigned, investigated, resolved, and closed.

about.title: About Sunflower CFM
about.mission: Sunflower CFM is the community feedback management platform of the Sunflower Organization, serving communities across the Occupied Palestinian Territories. We make it simple to raise concerns and ensure every voice is heard, tracked, and acted upon.

feedback.title: Share your feedback with us
feedback.subtitle: Your feedback helps us improve services. All submissions are reviewed by our team. You don't need an account.
feedback.name: Your name
feedback.descriptionPlaceholder: Please describe your feedback, complaint, or suggestion in detail…
feedback.help: Your feedback is confidential. Providing your name and contact information is optional but allows our team to follow up if needed.
feedback.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
feedback.successBody: Your feedback has been received. Our team will review it and take appropriate action.
